Research Notes

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Reginald De Braybrooke於1350年出生在英國英格蘭肯特可巴姆時，他的母親Isabel Meynell12歲，父親Sir Gerard Braybrooke III15歲。他於1392年與Joan de la Pole在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年9月29日在荷蘭藍德享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Reginald De Braybrooke于1350年出生在英国英格兰肯特可巴姆时，他的母亲Isabel Meynell12岁，父亲Sir Gerard Braybrooke III15岁。他于1392年与Joan de la Pole在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1405年9月29日在荷兰藍德享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braybrooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Reginald De Braybrooke was born in 1350, in Cobham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his mother, Isabel Meynell, was 12 and his father, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, was 15. He married Joan de la Pole in 1392, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 29 September 1405, in Zeeland, Netherlands, at the age of 55, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Reginald De Braybrooke est né en 1350, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, sa mère, Isabel Meynell, avait 12 ans et son père, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Joan de la Pole en 1392, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1405, à Zélande, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Reginald De Braybrooke 1350 in Cobham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Isabel Meynell 12 und sein Vater Sir Gerard Braybrooke III 15. Er hat 1392 in Kent, England Joan de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. September 1405 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Seeland, Niederlande und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald De Braybrooke è nato il nel 1350 nel Cobham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo madre, Isabel Meynell, aveva 12 anni e il suo padre, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Joan de la Pole nel 1392, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 29 settembre 1405, nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Cobham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald De Braybrookeが1350年にイギリスイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，母Isabel Meynellは12歳，父Sir Gerard Braybrooke IIIは15歳であった。1392年にイギリスケントでJoan de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1405年9月29日にオランダゼエランドで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald De Braybrooke(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Isabel Meynell(은)는 12세였고, 그의 아버지 Sir Gerard Braybrooke III(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 켄트에서 Joan de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 9월 29일 네덜란드 제랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald De Braybrooke nasceu em 1350, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, sua mãe, Isabel Meynell, tinha 12 anos e seu pai, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de la Pole em 1392, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1405, em Zelandia, Países Baixos, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Reginald De Braybrooke родился в 1350 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его матери по имени Isabel Meynell было 12 лет, а отцу, которого звали Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de la Pole в 1392 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 29 сентября 1405 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Reginald De Braybrooke nació en 1350, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su mamá, Isabel Meynell, tenía 12 años y su papá, Sir Gerard Braybrooke III, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Joan de la Pole en 1392, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1405, en Zeeland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
